data.title: Add design-blocked story filtering and status display to sprint SKILL.md
data.description:
## Description

Modify `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` to add design-blocked story filtering and status display.

### Changes to SKILL.md

1. **Phase 2 — Implementation Planning Gate (before story dispatch)**:
   Before dispatching /dso:implementation-plan for each story, check the story's tags (from .claude/scripts/dso ticket show output). If design:awaiting_import is present, skip the story and add it to an awaiting_design_stories list. Log: "Story <id> tagged design:awaiting_import — skipping implementation planning."

2. **Phase 3 — Batch Preparation**:
   After running sprint-next-batch.sh, parse any SKIPPED_DESIGN_AWAITING lines. Collect story IDs and titles for the status display.

3. **Phase 5 — Batch Completion Summary** (new section):
   Add an "Awaiting designer input" section after the batch completion summary:
   ```
   Awaiting designer input:
     - [<story-id>] <story-title> (awaiting since <date>)
     - [<story-id>] <story-title> (awaiting since <date>) ⚠️ STALE (>7 days)
   ```

4. **Staleness check**:
   For each design:awaiting_import story, check how long ago the tag was applied:
   - Read design.figma_staleness_days from config (default 7)
   - If tag age exceeds threshold, append staleness warning
   - Tag age can be estimated from ticket comments (the comment containing "Import designs/" was added by S1 when the tag was applied)

5. **Source tag constants**: Reference plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf for tag value (do not hardcode)

### Files to modify
- Edit: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md

## TDD Requirement
After modification, run .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md — the design-filter eval test case from T4 must PASS (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md contains design:awaiting_import tag check in Phase 2
  Verify: grep -q 'awaiting_import' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains "Awaiting designer input" status section
  Verify: grep -q 'Awaiting designer input' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references design.figma_staleness_days config
  Verify: grep -q 'figma_staleness_days' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references shared constants file
  Verify: grep -q 'figma-tags.conf' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md parses SKIPPED_DESIGN_AWAITING from sprint-next-batch.sh output
  Verify: grep -q 'SKIPPED_DESIGN_AWAITING' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] run-skill-evals.sh passes (exit 0) — design-filter eval test is GREEN
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
